metadata.title: Table Checkbox Row Color
metadata.description: Table Checkbox Row Color Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the color used to tint checked table rows in Reading Mode.
ast.target: 选择用于在阅读模式下为已勾选的表格行着色的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply a strikethrough to the row text when at least one checkbox in that row is checked.
ast.target: 当一行中至少有一个复选框被勾选时，对该行文本应用删除线。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 为已勾选行添加删除线
